Petition Seeking Correction Of Proposed Judgment Per Award Of Arbitrator(W/ Crt Rpt. Fee)
Off Calendar Oct-12-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Petitioner James River Insurance Company's Petition Seeking Correction Of Proposed Judgment Per Award Of Arbitrator is Off calendar. Respondent Apolinar Flores Silva's proposed "judgment per award of arbitrator," lodged on August 30, 2021, is not properly before the Court and will not be entered. On September 20, 2021, Respondent belatedly filed a petition to confirm, correct, or vacate contractual arbitration award, and lodged a proposed "second amended judgment per award of arbitrator," but failed to notice a hearing on that petition or to file a supporting memorandum. On October 1, 2021, Respondent lodged for filing an amended petition to confirm the award, but again failed to notice it for hearing. Petitioner James River Insurance Company has not filed a response to either petition. The Court will not enter judgment until after a petition to confirm, correct, or vacate the arbitration award has been properly noticed and heard. (See Code Civ. Proc. secs. 1286, 1286.4(b)(2), 1286.6, 1286.8.)
